summary: 10 pages tested. 5 PASS (/, /pricing, /subscribe, /menu, /not-found), 5 FAIL (/login, /terms, /privacy, /cart, /order-confirmed). Server returns 200 for all routes except /not-found (404). Common issues: unauthenticated users redirected away from auth-required pages, login/terms/privacy/cart/order-confirmed never render their intended content. 5 Unsplash images return 404 via _next/image. All pages fire a 401 GET /api/auth/me on load.
